ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding stock price record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the volume data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "gics" INTEGER /* GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) code */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector associated with the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry associated with the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indicators_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indicators_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sectors" (
  "stock_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-sector relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sectors_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industries" (
  "stock_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-industry relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industries_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" TEXT /* Average cost per share */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the portfolio stock data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
